vocab.meaning: một thành tích đáng tự hào
vocab.example: Earning a degree in Artificial Intelligence would be a real feather in my cap and a great career milestone.
I wouldn't mind having to burn the midnight oil if I were studying a subject as captivating as astrophysics.

vocab.meaning: bắt kịp tốc độ/thông tin mới nhất
vocab.example: I'd love to take a course in digital marketing just to get myself up to speed with the latest industry trends.

vocab.meaning: thế giới rộng mở (có mọi cơ hội trước mắt)
vocab.example: Once I master a second foreign language, I’ll feel like the world is my oyster in terms of travel and work.

vocab.meaning: nỗ lực vượt bậc/làm nhiều hơn mong đợi
vocab.example: When studying psychology, I’d be willing to go the extra mile to conduct original research on human behavior.

vocab.meaning: nhanh nhạy và hiểu rõ vấn đề
vocab.example: Studying financial management would help me stay on the ball when it comes to making smart investment decisions.

vocab.word: put my heart and soul into
vocab.meaning: dồn hết tâm huyết vào việc gì
vocab.example: If I had the chance to study fine arts, I would put my heart and soul into every painting I create.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu học tập một cách nghiêm túc
vocab.example: I'm itching to hit the books again and delve deep into the mysteries of ancient civilizations.
Logic and philosophy appeal to me because they train your brain to think straight even in complex situations.
I want to study green energy now because I don't want to miss the boat on the next industrial revolution.
